TH_RIN-INTEGRITY_POWER.title: Integrity
TH_RIN-INTEGRITY_POWER.description: Each time the player deals damage to this enemy, Integrity decreases by [blue]1%[/blue]. Special: If a single instance of damage exceeds [blue]25%[/blue] of its Max HP or if damage is caused by [gold]Ignite[/gold], it decreases by [blue]5%[/blue] instead.
TH_RIN-INTEGRITY_POWER.smartDescription:
Current Integrity: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]
Each time the player deals damage to this enemy, Integrity decreases by [blue]1%[/blue]. Special: If a single instance of damage exceeds [blue]25%[/blue] of its Max HP or if damage is caused by [gold]Ignite[/gold], it decreases by [blue]5%[/blue] instead.
TH_RIN-WRAITH_POWER.title: Wraith
TH_RIN-WRAITH_POWER.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, consume [blue]1[/blue] stack and make the enemy lose an additional [blue]4[/blue] HP.
TH_RIN-WRAITH_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, consume [blue]1[/blue] stack and make the enemy lose an additional [blue]{Cards}[/blue] HP.
TH_RIN-IGNITE_POWER.title: Ignite

TH_RIN-IGNITE_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then increase the stack by [blue]1[/blue].
